name: Chicken and Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine all ingredients except the chicken and parsley.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat; simmer for 30 to 40 minutes or until barley is tender.
4. Add chicken and parsley.
5. Cook until thoroughly heated.
Serves 4 (1-1/2 -cup servings)
Diabetic Choices:
1 Fruit/Vegetable Choice, 3 Protein Choices, 1/2 Bread Choice 1/2 Fat Choice
